hero.title: Renan Costa
hero.subtitle: Full-Stack & Backend Engineer focusing on high-performance systems and AI-driven automation.
hero.description: Specialized in architecting scalable solutions for B2B SaaS and technical platforms. Building at the intersection of Cloud, AI, and Systems Design.
about.title: Profile
about: Computer Engineering student and developer with a track record of shipping production-grade applications. From real-time sales intelligence dashboards to AgTech geospatial systems, I focus on performance, reliability, and business impact. Currently researching ML-based fraud detection for smart contracts.
projects.title: Selected Work
projects.1.title: Conversational AI & Sales Intel
projects.1.desc: Real-time sales dashboard with WebSocket integration tracking 50+ simultaneous conversations. Features an NLP-powered chatbot for lead qualification and scheduling.
projects.1.impact: 60% reduction in dashboard latency via Redis caching and query optimization.
projects.2.title: AgTech Geospatial Platform
projects.2.desc: In-production system for 50+ agricultural organizations processing real-time soil data for 200+ daily active users.
projects.2.impact: 40% reduction in data processing latency through optimized backend pipelines.
projects.3.title: Agricert/Terrus Platform
projects.3.desc: Infrastructure for a REST API serving 50+ corporate clients (Bayer, Cooxupé) with distributed data synchronization.
projects.3.impact: 35% reduction in synchronization latency and 80% test coverage.
projects.4.title: Smart Contract Fraud Detection
projects.4.desc: ML model (TensorFlow) for detecting malicious smart contracts via bytecode analysis (rug pulls, honeypots, exploits).
projects.4.impact: Deep learning approach to identify fraud patterns in raw bytecode.
contact.title: Get in touch
contact.description: Available for technical challenges and high-impact engineering roles.
